---
title: "project1"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(broom)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(brms)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

# Set brms backend if available
if (requireNamespace("cmdstanr", quietly = TRUE)) {
  options(brms.backend = "cmdstanr")
}


################################################################################
# 0 Load data and clean names
################################################################################

data_file <- "hiv_6624_final.csv"

hiv_data_raw <- read.csv(
  data_file,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  check.names = FALSE
)

nm <- names(hiv_data_raw)
nm <- trimws(nm)
bad <- is.na(nm) | nm == ""
if (any(bad)) nm[bad] <- paste0("x", which(bad))
nm <- tolower(nm)
nm <- make.unique(nm, sep = "_")
names(hiv_data_raw) <- nm

stopifnot(!any(is.na(names(hiv_data_raw))))
stopifnot(!any(names(hiv_data_raw) == ""))
stopifnot(!any(duplicated(names(hiv_data_raw))))


################################################################################
# 1 Recode special missing
################################################################################

recode_special_missing <- function(x) {
  if (!is.numeric(x)) return(x)
  x[x %in% c(999, 9999, 999999999)] <- NA
  x[x %in% c(-1, -8, -9)] <- NA
  x
}

hiv_data <- hiv_data_raw %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), recode_special_missing))


################################################################################
# 2 Required variables check
################################################################################

required_vars <- c(
  "newid","years","hivpos","everart","hard_drugs",
  "vload","leu3n","agg_phys","agg_ment",
  "age","race","educbas","bmi","smoke","adh"
)

missing_vars <- setdiff(required_vars, names(hiv_data))
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  print(missing_vars)
  stop("Some required variables are missing from the file.")
}


################################################################################
# 3 Eligible cohort
################################################################################

eligible_ids <- hiv_data %>%
  group_by(newid) %>%
  summarise(
    hiv_positive = any(hivpos == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ever_on_art  = any(everart == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(hiv_positive, ever_on_art) %>%
  pull(newid)

hiv_elig <- hiv_data %>%
  filter(newid %in% eligible_ids)


################################################################################
# 4 Create baseline and year 2 wide dataset
################################################################################

baseline <- hiv_elig %>%
  filter(years == 0) %>%
  arrange(newid) %>%
  group_by(newid) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

stopifnot("newid" %in% names(baseline))

year2 <- hiv_elig %>%
  filter(years == 2) %>%
  arrange(newid) %>%
  group_by(newid) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

stopifnot("newid" %in% names(year2))

baseline_keep <- baseline %>%
  transmute(
    newid,
    hard_drugs0 = hard_drugs,
    age0  = age,
    race0 = race,
    educ0 = educbas,
    bmi0  = bmi,
    smoke0 = smoke,
    vload0 = vload,
    cd40   = leu3n,
    phys0  = agg_phys,
    ment0  = agg_ment
  )

year2_keep <- year2 %>%
  transmute(
    newid,
    adh2   = adh,
    vload2 = vload,
    cd42   = leu3n,
    phys2  = agg_phys,
    ment2  = agg_ment
  )

analysis_df <- year2_keep %>%
  left_join(baseline_keep, by = "newid") %>%
  mutate(
    log_vload0 = log10(vload0 + 1),
    log_vload2 = log10(vload2 + 1),
    hard_drugs0 = as.integer(hard_drugs0),
    hard_drug_group = factor(
      hard_drugs0,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("Non user", "Hard drug user")
    ),
    race_white = case_when(
      race0 == 1 ~ "White non Hispanic",
      is.na(race0) ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ "Non White"
    ) %>% factor(),
    educ_college = case_when(
      educ0 %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4) ~ "Below college degree",
      educ0 %in% c(5, 6, 7) ~ "College degree or higher",
      is.na(educ0) ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(),
    
    # Collapse smoking: Never vs Ever
    smoke_collapsed = case_when(
      smoke0 == 1 ~ "Never smoker",
      smoke0 %in% c(2, 3) ~ "Ever smoker",
      is.na(smoke0) ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor() %>% relevel(ref = "Never smoker"),
    
    # Collapse adherence: >=95% vs <95%
    adh2_collapsed = case_when(
      adh2 %in% c(1, 2) ~ ">=95%",
      adh2 %in% c(3, 4) ~ "<95%",
      is.na(adh2) ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor() %>% relevel(ref = ">=95%")
  )

stopifnot(all(analysis_df$race0 %in% c(1:8, NA)))


################################################################################
# 5 Define CD4 outlier threshold using IQR method
################################################################################

cd4_stats <- analysis_df %>%
  summarise(
    q25 = quantile(cd42, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(cd42, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q75 - q25,
    upper_fence = q75 + 1.5 * iqr,
    max_cd4 = max(cd42, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

cd4_upper_fence <- cd4_stats$upper_fence


################################################################################
# 6 Build main analysis sample (with CD4 outlier exclusion)
################################################################################

df_final <- analysis_df %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(hard_drugs0),
    !is.na(age0),
    !is.na(race_white),
    !is.na(educ_college),
    !is.na(bmi0),
    !is.na(smoke_collapsed),
    !is.na(adh2_collapsed),
    !is.na(log_vload0), !is.na(log_vload2),
    !is.na(cd40), !is.na(cd42),
    cd42 < 1700,
    !is.na(phys0), !is.na(phys2),
    !is.na(ment0), !is.na(ment2)
  )


################################################################################
# 7 Sensitivity analysis sample (without CD4 outlier exclusion)
################################################################################

df_sensitivity <- analysis_df %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(hard_drugs0),
    !is.na(age0),
    !is.na(race_white),
    !is.na(educ_college),
    !is.na(bmi0),
    !is.na(smoke_collapsed),
    !is.na(adh2_collapsed),
    !is.na(log_vload0), !is.na(log_vload2),
    !is.na(cd40), !is.na(cd42),
    !is.na(phys0), !is.na(phys2),
    !is.na(ment0), !is.na(ment2)
  )


################################################################################
# 8 Sample size tracking table
################################################################################

sample_table <- tibble(
  stage = c(
    "Original cohort",
    "Eligible cohort HIV+ and ever ART",
    "Has year 0 record",
    "Has year 2 record",
    "Has both year 0 and year 2",
    "Complete covariates and outcomes",
    "Main analysis (exclude CD4 outlier)",
    "Sensitivity analysis (include all)"
  ),
  N_subjects = c(
    n_distinct(hiv_data$newid),
    n_distinct(hiv_elig$newid),
    n_distinct(baseline$newid),
    n_distinct(year2$newid),
    n_distinct(intersect(baseline$newid, year2$newid)),
    n_distinct(df_sensitivity$newid),
    n_distinct(df_final$newid),
    n_distinct(df_sensitivity$newid)
  )
)

sample_table %>% kable() %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 9 Dropout analysis
################################################################################

dropout_check <- baseline %>%
  mutate(
    has_year2 = newid %in% year2$newid
  ) %>%
  group_by(has_year2) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    vload_mean = mean(vload, na.rm = TRUE),
    vload_sd = sd(vload, na.rm = TRUE),
    cd4_mean = mean(leu3n, na.rm = TRUE),
    cd4_sd = sd(leu3n, na.rm = TRUE),
    hard_drug_pct = mean(hard_drugs == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    age_mean = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dropout_check %>% kable(digits = 2) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 10 Baseline descriptive table by hard drug group
################################################################################

baseline_desc <- df_final %>%
  group_by(hard_drug_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    age_mean = mean(age0, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_sd = sd(age0, na.rm = TRUE),
    bmi_mean = mean(bmi0, na.rm = TRUE),
    bmi_sd = sd(bmi0, na.rm = TRUE),
    logv0_mean = mean(log_vload0, na.rm = TRUE),
    logv0_sd = sd(log_vload0, na.rm = TRUE),
    cd40_mean = mean(cd40, na.rm = TRUE),
    cd40_sd = sd(cd40, na.rm = TRUE),
    phys0_mean = mean(phys0, na.rm = TRUE),
    phys0_sd = sd(phys0, na.rm = TRUE),
    ment0_mean = mean(ment0, na.rm = TRUE),
    ment0_sd = sd(ment0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

baseline_race <- df_final %>%
  count(hard_drug_group, race_white) %>%
  group_by(hard_drug_group) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

baseline_smoke <- df_final %>%
  count(hard_drug_group, smoke_collapsed) %>%
  group_by(hard_drug_group) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

baseline_educ <- df_final %>%
  count(hard_drug_group, educ_college) %>%
  group_by(hard_drug_group) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

baseline_adh <- df_final %>%
  count(hard_drug_group, adh2_collapsed) %>%
  group_by(hard_drug_group) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

baseline_desc %>% kable(digits = 2) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
baseline_race %>% kable(digits = 3) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
baseline_smoke %>% kable(digits = 3) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
baseline_educ %>% kable(digits = 3) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
baseline_adh %>% kable(digits = 3) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 11 Main analysis: Fit four linear models
################################################################################

fit_vload <- lm(
  log_vload2 ~ hard_drug_group + log_vload0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final
)

fit_cd4 <- lm(
  cd42 ~ hard_drug_group + cd40 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final
)

fit_phys <- lm(
  phys2 ~ hard_drug_group + phys0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final
)

fit_ment <- lm(
  ment2 ~ hard_drug_group + ment0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final
)


################################################################################
# 12 Robust SE tables
################################################################################

robust_table <- function(fit) {
  ct <- coeftest(fit, vcov. = vcovHC(fit, type = "HC3"))
  tibble(
    term = rownames(ct),
    estimate = ct[, 1],
    robust_se = ct[, 2],
    t_value = ct[, 3],
    p_value = ct[, 4]
  )
}

robust_vload <- robust_table(fit_vload)
robust_cd4 <- robust_table(fit_cd4)
robust_phys <- robust_table(fit_phys)
robust_ment <- robust_table(fit_ment)

robust_vload %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
robust_cd4 %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
robust_phys %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
robust_ment %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 13 Sensitivity analysis: CD4 model without outlier exclusion
################################################################################

fit_cd4_sensitivity <- lm(
  cd42 ~ hard_drug_group + cd40 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_sensitivity
)

robust_cd4_sensitivity <- robust_table(fit_cd4_sensitivity)

robust_cd4_sensitivity %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

sensitivity_comparison <- tibble(
  analysis = c("Main (n=463, exclude CD4 outlier)", 
               "Sensitivity (n=464, include all)"),
  hard_drug_coef = c(
    coef(fit_cd4)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_cd4_sensitivity)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  ),
  hard_drug_se = c(
    robust_cd4$robust_se[robust_cd4$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_cd4_sensitivity$robust_se[robust_cd4_sensitivity$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  ),
  hard_drug_p = c(
    robust_cd4$p_value[robust_cd4$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_cd4_sensitivity$p_value[robust_cd4_sensitivity$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  )
)

sensitivity_comparison %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 14 Mediation analysis: Models without adherence
################################################################################

fit_vload_no_adh <- lm(
  log_vload2 ~ hard_drug_group + log_vload0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final
)

fit_cd4_no_adh <- lm(
  cd42 ~ hard_drug_group + cd40 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final
)

fit_phys_no_adh <- lm(
  phys2 ~ hard_drug_group + phys0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final
)

fit_ment_no_adh <- lm(
  ment2 ~ hard_drug_group + ment0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final
)

robust_vload_no_adh <- robust_table(fit_vload_no_adh)
robust_cd4_no_adh <- robust_table(fit_cd4_no_adh)
robust_phys_no_adh <- robust_table(fit_phys_no_adh)
robust_ment_no_adh <- robust_table(fit_ment_no_adh)

mediation_comparison <- tibble(
  outcome = c("VLOAD", "CD4", "PHYS", "MENT"),
  coef_with_adh = c(
    coef(fit_vload)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_cd4)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_phys)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_ment)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  ),
  coef_without_adh = c(
    coef(fit_vload_no_adh)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_cd4_no_adh)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_phys_no_adh)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_ment_no_adh)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  ),
  pct_change = (coef_without_adh - coef_with_adh) / abs(coef_without_adh) * 100
)

mediation_comparison %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 15 Bayesian models - FIXED: Using default (flat) priors
################################################################################

# Use default priors (flat/uninformative) to let data dominate
bfit_vload <- brm(
  log_vload2 ~ hard_drug_group + log_vload0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4,
  cores = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  seed = 1
)

bfit_cd4 <- brm(
  cd42 ~ hard_drug_group + cd40 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4,
  cores = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  seed = 1
)

bfit_phys <- brm(
  phys2 ~ hard_drug_group + phys0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4,
  cores = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  seed = 1
)

bfit_ment <- brm(
  ment2 ~ hard_drug_group + ment0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college + adh2_collapsed,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4,
  cores = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  seed = 1
)


################################################################################
# 16 Model comparison: Frequentist vs Bayesian
################################################################################

extract_harddrug <- function(bfit) {
  s <- posterior_summary(bfit)
  rn <- rownames(s)
  
  term <- rn[str_detect(rn, "b_hard_drug_groupHarddruguser")]
  
  if (length(term) == 0) {
    warning("No matching term found!")
    return(tibble(term = NA_character_, estimate = NA_real_, q025 = NA_real_, q975 = NA_real_))
  }
  
  tibble(
    term = term,
    estimate = s[term, "Estimate"],
    q025 = s[term, "Q2.5"],
    q975 = s[term, "Q97.5"]
  )
}

bayesian_results <- bind_rows(
  VLOAD = extract_harddrug(bfit_vload),
  CD4   = extract_harddrug(bfit_cd4),
  PHYS  = extract_harddrug(bfit_phys),
  MENT  = extract_harddrug(bfit_ment),
  .id = "outcome"
)

bayesian_results %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

comparison_table <- tibble(
  outcome = c("VLOAD", "CD4", "PHYS", "MENT"),
  freq_estimate = c(
    coef(fit_vload)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_cd4)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_phys)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    coef(fit_ment)["hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  ),
  freq_se = c(
    robust_vload$robust_se[robust_vload$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_cd4$robust_se[robust_cd4$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_phys$robust_se[robust_phys$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_ment$robust_se[robust_ment$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  ),
  freq_pvalue = c(
    robust_vload$p_value[robust_vload$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_cd4$p_value[robust_cd4$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_phys$p_value[robust_phys$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"],
    robust_ment$p_value[robust_ment$term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user"]
  )
)

comparison_table <- comparison_table %>%
  left_join(
    bayesian_results %>% select(outcome, bayes_estimate = estimate, bayes_q025 = q025, bayes_q975 = q975),
    by = "outcome"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    freq_ci_lower = freq_estimate - 1.96 * freq_se,
    freq_ci_upper = freq_estimate + 1.96 * freq_se,
    freq_sig = ifelse(freq_pvalue < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
    bayes_sig = ifelse(bayes_q025 * bayes_q975 > 0, "Yes", "No")
  )

comparison_table %>%
  select(outcome, freq_estimate, freq_ci_lower, freq_ci_upper, freq_pvalue,
         bayes_estimate, bayes_q025, bayes_q975) %>%
  kable(digits = 3) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 17 WAIC comparison for adherence models - FIXED: Using default priors
################################################################################

bfit_vload_no_adh <- brm(
  log_vload2 ~ hard_drug_group + log_vload0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 2000, seed = 1
)

bfit_cd4_no_adh <- brm(
  cd42 ~ hard_drug_group + cd40 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 2000, seed = 1
)

bfit_phys_no_adh <- brm(
  phys2 ~ hard_drug_group + phys0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 2000, seed = 1
)

bfit_ment_no_adh <- brm(
  ment2 ~ hard_drug_group + ment0 + age0 + race_white + bmi0 + smoke_collapsed + educ_college,
  data = df_final,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 2000, seed = 1
)

waic_vload_with <- waic(bfit_vload)
waic_vload_without <- waic(bfit_vload_no_adh)
waic_cd4_with <- waic(bfit_cd4)
waic_cd4_without <- waic(bfit_cd4_no_adh)
waic_phys_with <- waic(bfit_phys)
waic_phys_without <- waic(bfit_phys_no_adh)
waic_ment_with <- waic(bfit_ment)
waic_ment_without <- waic(bfit_ment_no_adh)

waic_comparison <- tibble(
  outcome = c("VLOAD", "CD4", "PHYS", "MENT"),
  waic_with_adh = c(
    waic_vload_with$estimates["waic", "Estimate"],
    waic_cd4_with$estimates["waic", "Estimate"],
    waic_phys_with$estimates["waic", "Estimate"],
    waic_ment_with$estimates["waic", "Estimate"]
  ),
  waic_without_adh = c(
    waic_vload_without$estimates["waic", "Estimate"],
    waic_cd4_without$estimates["waic", "Estimate"],
    waic_phys_without$estimates["waic", "Estimate"],
    waic_ment_without$estimates["waic", "Estimate"]
  ),
  waic_diff = waic_without_adh - waic_with_adh,
  better_model = ifelse(waic_diff > 0, "With adherence", "Without adherence")
)

waic_comparison %>%
  kable(digits = 2) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


################################################################################
# 18 Summary of findings
################################################################################

sig_results <- comparison_table %>%
  filter(freq_sig == "Yes" | bayes_sig == "Yes") %>%
  select(outcome, freq_estimate, freq_pvalue, bayes_estimate)

if (nrow(sig_results) > 0) {
  sig_results %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
}

nonsig_results <- comparison_table %>%
  filter(freq_sig == "No" & bayes_sig == "No") %>%
  select(outcome, freq_estimate, freq_pvalue, bayes_estimate)

if (nrow(nonsig_results) > 0) {
  nonsig_results %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
}

mediation_summary <- mediation_comparison %>%
  mutate(
    mediated = ifelse(abs(pct_change) > 10, "Yes (>10% change)", "No (<10% change)")
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, coef_without_adh, coef_with_adh, pct_change, mediated)

mediation_summary %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

waic_comparison %>% 
  select(outcome, waic_diff, better_model) %>%
  kable(digits = 2) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

consistency_check <- comparison_table %>%
  mutate(
    diff = abs(freq_estimate - bayes_estimate),
    consistent = ifelse(diff < 0.5, "Consistent", "Check difference")
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, freq_estimate, bayes_estimate, diff, consistent)

consistency_check %>% kable(digits = 4) %>% kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# table
# Sample Table
simple_sample_table <- tibble(
  Stage = c(
    "Original cohort",
    "HIV-positive and ever on ART",
    "Has baseline and 2-year follow-up",
    "Complete data on all variables",
    "Final analytic sample"
  ),
  N = c(715, 669, 506, 464, 463)
)

simple_sample_table %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Table 1. Sample Selection",
    align = c("l", "r")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left") %>%
  footnote(
    general = "One participant excluded due to extreme CD4 value."
  )



# TABLE 2: Baseline Characteristics 
phys0_stats <- df_final %>%
  group_by(hard_drug_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(phys0, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(phys0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ment0_stats <- df_final %>%
  group_by(hard_drug_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(ment0, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(ment0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )


baseline_table <- tibble(
  Characteristic = c(
    "N",
    "Age, years",
    "BMI, kg/m²",
    "Viral load, log₁₀ copies/mL",
    "CD4 count, cells/μL",
    "Physical QoL score",
    "Mental QoL score",
    "Race/ethnicity",
    "  White, non-Hispanic",
    "  Non-White",
    "Smoking status",
    "  Never smoker",
    "  Ever smoker",
    "Education",
    "  Below college degree",
    "  College degree or higher",
    "Medication adherence ≥95%"
  ),
  Non_user = c(
    "427",
    "43.1 (8.7)",
    "26.5 (24.1)",
    "4.5 (0.9)",
    "374.3 (202.3)",
    paste0(sprintf("%.1f", phys0_stats$mean[1]), " (", sprintf("%.1f", phys0_stats$sd[1]), ")"),
    paste0(sprintf("%.1f", ment0_stats$mean[1]), " (", sprintf("%.1f", ment0_stats$sd[1]), ")"),
    "",
    "276 (64.6%)",
    "151 (35.4%)",
    "",
    "136 (31.9%)",
    "291 (68.1%)",
    "",
    "237 (55.5%)",
    "190 (44.5%)",
    "382 (89.5%)"
  ),
  Hard_drug_user = c(
    "36",
    "43.9 (9.5)",
    "23.6 (3.5)",
    "4.6 (0.9)",
    "360.0 (200.8)",
    paste0(sprintf("%.1f", phys0_stats$mean[2]), " (", sprintf("%.1f", phys0_stats$sd[2]), ")"),
    paste0(sprintf("%.1f", ment0_stats$mean[2]), " (", sprintf("%.1f", ment0_stats$sd[2]), ")"),
    "",
    "19 (52.8%)",
    "17 (47.2%)",
    "",
    "0 (0%)",
    "36 (100%)",
    "",
    "26 (72.2%)",
    "10 (27.8%)",
    "35 (97.2%)"
  )
)

baseline_table %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Table 2. Baseline Characteristics by Hard Drug Use Status",
    col.names = c("Characteristic", "Non-user (n=427)", "Hard drug user (n=36)")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
  pack_rows("Continuous variables, mean (SD)", 2, 7) %>%
  pack_rows("Categorical variables, n (%)", 8, 16) %>%
  footnote(general = "Continuous variables presented as mean (SD); categorical variables as n (%).")




format_freq_coef <- function(est, se, p) {
  ci_lower <- est - 1.96 * se
  ci_upper <- est + 1.96 * se
  
  if (p < 0.001) {
    sprintf("%.3f (%.3f, %.3f), p<0.001", est, ci_lower, ci_upper)
  } else {
    sprintf("%.3f (%.3f, %.3f), p=%.3f", est, ci_lower, ci_upper, p)
  }
}

format_bayes_coef <- function(est, q025, q975) {
  sprintf("%.3f (%.3f, %.3f)", est, q025, q975)
}


################################################################################
# Table 3a: Frequentist
################################################################################

create_freq_wide_table <- function() {
  
  # Extract coefficients from one model
  extract_one_model <- function(robust_tbl, col_name) {
    robust_tbl %>%
      mutate(
        formatted = pmap_chr(
          list(estimate, robust_se, p_value),
          format_freq_coef
        )
      ) %>%
      select(term, formatted) %>%
      rename(!!col_name := formatted)
  }
  
  # Extract all 4 models
  vload_coefs <- extract_one_model(robust_vload, "vload")
  cd4_coefs <- extract_one_model(robust_cd4, "cd4")
  phys_coefs <- extract_one_model(robust_phys, "phys")
  ment_coefs <- extract_one_model(robust_ment, "ment")
  
  # Merge
  result <- vload_coefs %>%
    full_join(cd4_coefs, by = "term") %>%
    full_join(phys_coefs, by = "term") %>%
    full_join(ment_coefs, by = "term")
  
  result <- result %>%
    filter(!term %in% c("log_vload0", "cd40", "phys0", "ment0"))
  
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        term == "(Intercept)" ~ "Intercept",
        term == "hard_drug_groupHard drug user" ~ "Hard Drug Use (Yes vs. No)",
        term == "age0" ~ "Age",
        term == "race_whiteWhite non Hispanic" ~ "Race (Other vs. Non-Hispanic White)",
        term == "educ_collegeCollege degree or higher" ~ "Education (College+ vs. Below)",
        term == "bmi0" ~ "BMI",
        term == "smoke_collapsedEver smoker" ~ "Smoking (Current vs. Non/Former)",
        term == "adh2_collapsed<95%" ~ "Adherence (<95% vs. ≥95%)",
        TRUE ~ term
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Variable, vload, cd4, phys, ment)
  
  # Reorder
  var_order <- c(
    "Intercept",
    "Hard Drug Use (Yes vs. No)",
    "Age",
    "Race (Other vs. Non-Hispanic White)",
    "Education (College+ vs. Below)",
    "BMI",
    "Smoking (Current vs. Non/Former)",
    "Adherence (<95% vs. ≥95%)"
  )
  
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, levels = var_order)) %>%
    arrange(Variable) %>%
    mutate(Variable = as.character(Variable))
  
  return(result)
}

table3a <- create_freq_wide_table()

table3a_output <- table3a %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Table 3a. Frequentist Adjusted Model: All Covariate Effects Across Outcomes",
    col.names = c("Variable", "Change in Log10 Viral Load", "Change in CD4+ T Cell Count", 
                  "Change in Physical QoL", "Change in Mental QoL"),
    align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, font_size = 9) %>%
  footnote(
    general = c(
      "Note: Values shown as estimate (95% CI), p-value.",
      "Model: outcome ~ hard drug use + baseline outcome + age + race + education + BMI + smoking + adherence.",
      "Each model adjusted for the corresponding baseline outcome (baseline coefficients not shown).",
      "Outcomes modeled as Year 2 values adjusted for baseline. Viral load modeled on the log10 scale."
    ),
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE
  )

print(table3a_output)



# Table 3b: Bayesian

extract_bayes_coefs <- function(bfit, col_name) {
  s <- posterior_summary(bfit)
  beta_names <- rownames(s)[str_detect(rownames(s), "^b_")]
  
  tibble(
    term = beta_names,
    estimate = s[beta_names, "Estimate"],
    q025 = s[beta_names, "Q2.5"],
    q975 = s[beta_names, "Q97.5"]
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      formatted = pmap_chr(list(estimate, q025, q975), format_bayes_coef)
    ) %>%
    select(term, formatted) %>%
    rename(!!col_name := formatted)
}

create_bayes_wide_table <- function() {
  
  # Extract from all 4 models
  vload_coefs <- extract_bayes_coefs(bfit_vload, "vload")
  cd4_coefs <- extract_bayes_coefs(bfit_cd4, "cd4")
  phys_coefs <- extract_bayes_coefs(bfit_phys, "phys")
  ment_coefs <- extract_bayes_coefs(bfit_ment, "ment")
  
  # Merge
  result <- vload_coefs %>%
    full_join(cd4_coefs, by = "term") %>%
    full_join(phys_coefs, by = "term") %>%
    full_join(ment_coefs, by = "term")
  
  result <- result %>%
    filter(!str_detect(term, "log_vload0|^b_cd40$|^b_phys0$|^b_ment0$"))
  
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        str_detect(term, "b_Intercept") ~ "Intercept",
        str_detect(term, "hard_drug_groupHarddruguser") ~ "Hard Drug Use (Yes vs. No)",
        str_detect(term, "\\bage0\\b") ~ "Age",
        str_detect(term, "race_white") ~ "Race (Other vs. Non-Hispanic White)",
        str_detect(term, "educ_college") ~ "Education (College+ vs. Below)",
        str_detect(term, "\\bbmi0\\b") ~ "BMI",
        str_detect(term, "smoke_collapsed") ~ "Smoking (Current vs. Non/Former)",
        str_detect(term, "adh2_collapsed") ~ "Adherence (<95% vs. ≥95%)",
        TRUE ~ term
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Variable, vload, cd4, phys, ment)
  
  # Reorder
  var_order <- c(
    "Intercept",
    "Hard Drug Use (Yes vs. No)",
    "Age",
    "Race (Other vs. Non-Hispanic White)",
    "Education (College+ vs. Below)",
    "BMI",
    "Smoking (Current vs. Non/Former)",
    "Adherence (<95% vs. ≥95%)"
  )
  
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, levels = var_order)) %>%
    arrange(Variable) %>%
    mutate(Variable = as.character(Variable))
  
  return(result)
}

table3b <- create_bayes_wide_table()

table3b_output <- table3b %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Table 3b. Bayesian Adjusted Model: All Covariate Effects Across Outcomes",
    col.names = c("Variable", "Change in Log10 Viral Load", "Change in CD4+ T Cell Count", 
                  "Change in Physical QoL", "Change in Mental QoL"),
    align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, font_size = 9) %>%
  footnote(
    general = c(
      "Note: Values shown as posterior mean (95% credible interval).",
      "Model: outcome ~ hard drug use + baseline outcome + age + race + education + BMI + smoking + adherence.",
      "Each model adjusted for the corresponding baseline outcome (baseline coefficients not shown).",
      "Priors: default (uninformative) priors used.",
      "Outcomes modeled as Year 2 values adjusted for baseline. Viral load modeled on the log10 scale."
    ),
    footnote_as_chunk = TRUE
  )

print(table3b_output)


# SUPPLEMENTARY TABLE S1: Mediation

mediation_comparison %>%
  mutate(
    Outcome = c("Viral load", "CD4 count", "Physical QoL", "Mental QoL"),
    Interpretation = ifelse(abs(pct_change) > 10, "Possible mediation", "No mediation")
  ) %>%
  select(Outcome, coef_without_adh, coef_with_adh, pct_change, Interpretation) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Supplementary Table S1. Mediation Analysis",
    digits = 2,
    col.names = c("Outcome", "Without Adherence", "With Adherence", "% Change", "Interpretation")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "% Change = [(β with - β without) / |β without|] × 100. Mediation defined as >10% change.")



# SUPPLEMENTARY TABLE S2: WAIC
waic_comparison %>%
  mutate(
    Outcome = c("Viral load", "CD4 count", "Physical QoL", "Mental QoL")
  ) %>%
  select(Outcome, waic_with_adh, waic_without_adh, waic_diff, better_model) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Supplementary Table S2. WAIC Model Comparison",
    digits = 2,
    col.names = c("Outcome", "With Adherence", "Without Adherence", "ΔWAIC", "Better Model")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(
    general = c(
      "ΔWAIC = WAIC(without) - WAIC(with)",
      "ΔWAIC < 5 indicates minimal difference, suggesting adherence is not a strong mediator."
    )
  )
```
